title: Disclosure clock on a preliminary, contested lab result
summary: A preliminary sample sits above the advisory threshold; the confirmatory result is pending. Every turn of delay adds legal and narrative risk.
escalation_note: The disclosure-timing record grew another cycle: the town knew, and the public statement still had not caught up.
resolution_note: The findings went on the public record before the timing record became indefensible.

title: Sole-source contractor leverage over the repair
summary: Only Marquotte Utilities is certified for the failing valves. Indemnity demands and premium change orders compound dependency.
escalation_note: Marquotte priced another change order into its leverage; structural dependency on the sole certified firm deepened.
resolution_note: A credible squeeze on Marquotte broke the assumption that the town would pay any change order.
